honesty: Raises W9.1 (amplitude amplification) to amplitude ESTIMATION: QPE on the Grover Q operator estimates the amplitude a. Sealed Tier-0 EXACT (composite==golden up-to-phase, no MatrixGate): 4 analytic Ry modules + controlled-Ry apps (honest CNOT·Ry ladder) + the QAE circuit qae3_pi8 (reusing sealed iqft3/cnot/h_gate/z_gate). The amplitude-ESTIMATION readout (counting measurement -> a_est=sin^2(pi*y/2^t)) is an OBSERVATION, NOT a seal: exact instance a=sin^2(pi/8), both peaks y in {1,7} recover the true a exactly. modules 63->67, apps 91->94.

estimation_observation.note: OBSERVATION, NOT A SEAL — the sealed QAE circuit is executed on |0>; the counting register measurement y yields a_est=sin^2(pi*y/2^t). This is amplitude ESTIMATION behavior (W9.1 was amplification). Exact instance: both peaks recover the true a.
